knownIssues.description: Multiple product variation images return 404 (BrownJeans_md.png, fabric_md.png, grey_md.png, skinny_md.png, blue_flannel__md.jpg, dark_md.png, dark1_md.png, greyfabric_md.png, BrownJeans_sm.png). CDN/asset issue, not blocking functionality.
Configurable product PDP: decreasing quantity from 1 to 0 adds a new line item to cart instead of removing. UX behavior note, not a functional defect per se.

results.title: Navigate to variation product PDP and verify variation selector
results.notes: High Waist Jeans Brown PDP loaded. Color and Size selectors displayed. 6 variations listed. Properties (Color, Size) render correctly.

results.title: Select variation and verify price/image/SKU update
results.notes: Selected Color: Brown, Size: 29. Price updated to $35.00. SKU and availability updated. Image 404 for some variant thumbnails (known issue IMG-404).

results.title: Switch between variations and verify state consistency
results.notes: Switched between multiple color/size combinations. Price, availability, and URL slug updated correctly for each selection. Unavailable combinations greyed out.

results.title: Add variation to cart and verify cart line item
results.notes: Added Brown/29 variation to cart. Cart count incremented. Line item shows correct variation properties and price.

results.title: Verify unavailable variation combinations are disabled
results.notes: Out-of-stock combinations visually disabled (greyed out). Cannot add unavailable variation to cart.

results.title: Verify variation URL updates on selection
results.notes: URL slug changes to match selected variation. Direct navigation to variation URL pre-selects the correct variant.

results.title: Mobile responsive: variation selector at 375px
results.notes: Viewport resized to 375px. Variation selectors render correctly. Touch targets adequate (>44px). Price and properties visible. Screenshot: suite-13-mobile-variants.png

results.title: Variation with single option auto-selects
results.notes: Not in original execution scope for this run.

results.title: Variation min/max quantity enforcement
results.notes: Not in original execution scope for this run.

results.title: Variation breadcrumb navigation
results.notes: Not in original execution scope for this run.

results.title: Create a new list from Lists page
results.notes: Created 'QA-Suite13-Test-List' from Lists overview. List appears in list overview with correct name. Description field accepted input.

results.title: Add product to list from PDP
results.notes: Added High Waist Jeans Brown to QA-Suite13-Test-List from PDP. Confirmation shown. List count updated.

results.title: View list contents with product details
results.notes: Navigated to list detail page. Product displayed with name, image, price ($35.00), and variation properties. Quantity selector present.

results.title: Add to cart from list
results.notes: Clicked 'Add to cart' on list item. Confirmation dialog appeared. Cart count incremented from 7 to 8. Product added with correct variation properties.

results.title: Remove product from list
results.notes: Removed item from list. Confirmation dialog shown. List now shows empty state message.

results.title: Delete list
results.notes: Deleted QA-Suite13-Test-List from lists overview dropdown menu. Confirmation dialog shown. List removed from overview page.

results.title: View Ship-to selector on storefront header
results.notes: Ship-to selector visible in header. Current delivery address displayed. Dropdown opens with address list.

results.title: Add new shipping address from Ship-to selector
results.notes: Added new address via Ship-to selector form. Address validated and saved. Selector updated to show new address.

results.title: Edit existing shipping address
results.notes: User logged out before execution. Re-login would exceed test session scope.

results.title: Delete shipping address
results.notes: User logged out before execution. Re-login would exceed test session scope.

results.title: Set default shipping address
results.notes: User logged out before execution. Re-login would exceed test session scope.

results.title: Select address in checkout flow
results.notes: User logged out before execution. Re-login would exceed test session scope.

results.title: Navigate to configurable product PDP
results.notes: Configurable Hat PDP loaded. 'Customize' button visible. Configuration sections displayed with options.

results.title: Select configuration options and verify price update
results.notes: Selected options across configuration sections. Total price recalculated to include selected option prices. Section prices displayed correctly.

results.title: Add configured product to cart
results.notes: Added configured product to cart. Cart line item shows base product + selected configuration. Configuration details visible in cart.

results.title: Verify required vs optional configuration sections
results.notes: Required sections enforce selection before add-to-cart. Optional sections show 'None' option to skip. Validation messages appear for missing required selections.

results.title: Edit configuration in cart
results.notes: Edit configuration button available on cart line item. Opens configuration editor. Changes saved and price recalculated. Note: qty decrease to 0 creates new line item (known issue CFG-QTY-UX).

results.title: Mobile responsive: configuration sections at 375px
results.notes: Viewport resized to 375px. Configuration sections stack vertically. Option selectors usable with touch. Prices visible.

results.title: Verify empty compare state
results.notes: Compare page shows empty state with message prompting user to add products. No errors in console.

results.title: Add products to compare and verify comparison table
results.notes: Added 2 products to compare from category page. Compare page shows side-by-side comparison with property rows (name, price, availability, specifications). Differences highlighted.

results.title: Clear compare list
results.notes: Clicked 'Clear list' button. Confirmation dialog appeared. Compare list emptied. Page shows empty state.

results.title: Compare max products (5 limit)
results.notes: Not in original execution scope for this run. Covered by CMP-002 partial validation.

consoleErrors: Multiple additional image 404 errors on variation product pages
